response:
I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented professional with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription, possessing comprehensive knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I excel in interpersonal communication, team leadership, and continuous learning, often seeking new challenges and responsibilities. I am a multi-tasker who excels in supervising, transcribing, and managing customer relationships, consistently exceeding productivity to support organizational success.  

I have experience as a medical scribe and editor with companies such as V Transcriptions LLC, S10 Healthcare Solutions Ltd, and C-Bay Systems India Private Limited. I have also held roles as a supervisor and customer relationship executive in the glass industry, where I managed a team and enhanced customer service. I have served as a quality analyst, controller, and editor in medical transcription, focusing on accuracy, turnaround time, and team performance.  

I am proficient in Microsoft Office, electronic health records, and email, with a typing speed of 70-80 words per minute. I am passionate about learning, adaptable, and committed to delivering high-quality work. I am an Indian national with an on-visit visa and am eager to contribute to a professional and dynamic environment.  

Please let me know if you'd like a version tailored for a specific job posting or application.
